CVE-2019-16163.title: Oniguruma before 6.9.3 allows Stack Exhaustion in regcomp.c becau ...
CVE-2019-16163.summary: Oniguruma before 6.9.3 allows Stack Exhaustion in regcomp.c because of recursion in regparse.c.

CVE-2019-19012.title: An integer overflow in the search_in_range function in regexec.c  ...
CVE-2019-19012.summary: An integer overflow in the search_in_range function in regexec.c in Oniguruma 6.x before 6.9.4_rc2 leads to an out-of-bounds read, in which the offset of this read is under the control of an attacker. (This only affects the 32-bit compiled version). Remote attackers can cause a denial-of-service or information disclosure, or possibly have unspecified other impact, via a crafted regular expression.

CVE-2019-19204.title: An issue was discovered in Oniguruma 6.x before 6.9.4_rc2. In the ...
CVE-2019-19204.summary: An issue was discovered in Oniguruma 6.x before 6.9.4_rc2. In the function fetch_interval_quantifier (formerly known as fetch_range_quantifier) in regparse.c, PFETCH is called without checking PEND. This leads to a heap-based buffer over-read.

CVE-2019-19246.title: Oniguruma through 6.9.3, as used in PHP 7.3.x and other products, ...
CVE-2019-19246.summary: Oniguruma through 6.9.3, as used in PHP 7.3.x and other products, has a heap-based buffer over-read in str_lower_case_match in regexec.c.
